name: Block Master: Polygonal Puzzle
description: A game about collecting blocks. But not the usual ones. Instead of the familiar squares, you get a bunch of polygons that you have to fit across the entire playing field to win. This fascinating online puzzle game will not let you get bored, complete all the levels in the game, divided into categories from the easiest to the most difficult to think about! Compete with other players on the leaderboard as you complete the levels!
instructions: Your goal is to beat as many stages as you can Theyre grouped by how easy they are so start with whatever feels right for you Once you pick a stage just fill the whole board with the shapes they give you Put the shapes next to each other so it makes
